commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4705c04f8efc19ab88200c0662c6d3762c502038)
commands.review_summary:
The PR threads optional `isHeartbeat` through the embedded attempt finalizer and loop hook and adds context-engine lifecycle regression tests.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +59. Total +65 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main declares `afterTurn(params).isHeartbeat` in the context-engine type while the shared finalizer and loop-hook call sites omit it. I did not run a live heartbeat because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because contributor real behavior proof is missing and maintainers need to choose whether to repair this branch or use a broader sibling PR as the landing path.

target.title: fix(context-engine): forward isHeartbeat to afterTurn
target.body:
The ContextEngine.afterTurn() SDK type declares isHeartbeat?: boolean but the harness lifecycle helpers never pass it. Context-engine plugins that check isHeartbeat (e.g. to skip persistence for heartbeat runs) therefore cannot distinguish heartbeat turns from normal turns.

## Changes
- Add isHeartbeat parameter to  inalizeHarnessContextEngineTurn and forward to ^GfterTurn call
- Add isHeartbeat parameter to installContextEngineLoopHook and forward to its ^GfterTurn call
- Wire isHeartbeat from params.bootstrapContextRunKind === heartbeat` at both call sites in the attempt runner

Both afterTurn seams (finalizeAttempt and the tool-loop hook) now receive the heartbeat marker.

## Verification
- Existing tests pass (context-engine-lifecycle: 9/9)
- Added focused regression tests for true, false, and omitted isHeartbeat values on the afterTurn seam
- Lint clean

Closes #89302

@clawsweeper re-review
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt
